mapper.sql: A.NCONFIG_ROUTE_SEQ, A.SOFFICECODE, A.SFILE_NM, A.SHOST_IP , A.SHOST_NM, A.SROUTE_IP_BLOCK, A.PROUTE_CIDR, A.SROUTE_GW_IP , A.SROUTE_GW_IF_IP, A.SROUTE_GW_IF_NM, A.PIF_CIDR, A.NCONFIG_INTERFACE_SEQ , A.NFLAG_LEVEL, A.SSAID, A.SLLUM, A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , A.SAUDIT_FLAG, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD

choose.when:
ORDER BY A.SHOST_IP
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.SROUTE_GW_IF_NM
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.SROUTE_IP_BLOCK
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.SAUDIT_FLAG
ASC
DESC
ASC
choose.otherwise:
ORDER BY A.SHOST_IP
ASC
DESC
ASC

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM FCT.TB_CONFIG_ROUTE_MST A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM FCT.TB_CONFIG_ROUTE_MST A
